chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2116 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A No.12329/2016 3. For hearing of main case 29.01.2019. *** 1to3. This petition was filed on 16.08.2016, but record shows that petitioner and his counsel have never pursued this petition and got it posted for further proceedings. Today, for the first time the case has been fixed in Court but no one is present on behalf of the petitioner. Accordingly, this petition stands dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
